name: Grand Brix Shooter
short_description: Challenge yourself to a new kind of bullet-hell fusion shooter. Change your aircraft to get new skills just when you need them against advancing foes. Aim for the top spot!
detailed_description:
[Patch V1.01] Updates

[Grand Brick Shooter] Patch Note update
Hello everyone!
Thank you for purchasing our game, Grand Brix Shooter. The dev team is trying hard to improve our game.

1) UI Updates
-Menu bars scroller is fixed
-'Retry' tab is added to the Pause menu in Arcade Mode. You can now start again at the beginning of any saved stage at any time.
-‘Restart tab is added to the Pause menu in Challenge mode. All the settings will be reset from the beginning and start all over from the first stage.
- ‘Tutorial ON / OFF’ tab is added to the menu from Arcade Mode. If you leave this menu ON, you can always check the tutorial.
-'Story ON / OFF' menu is added to the arcade mode. You can now turn on and off the story that comes up during the game. However, the ending will show regardless of the setting.

2) Modification on the balance of the following units and change of some specifications.
-Aero Fighter: special skill damage fix
-Heavy Armor: skill location fix
-Trooper: hit range fix
-Pesticide: basic skill fix
Phoenix: Change aircraft color (Pink-> Orange)
-Crusader: special skill fix
-Invader: basic skill damage fix / cooldown applied
-Laevateinn: special skill fix
-Tiamat: basic skill fix

3) Combo Point Item “gem” added in the game
-When the enemy is destroyed, the gem is appeared to increase the combo points.

7) In-Game HUD fix
-Changed the configuration of the HUD Layout to make it easier to recognize the combo system more straight forward.
-Symbol icons added to the left of each gauge, such as XP, Combo, and special skill.
Combo bonus information added to Fusion Units.
-When the unit does “Fusion”, combo bonus effect is added to show the increase / decrease.

** [Bug Fix] **
The following minor bugs have been fixed.
-Leaderboard UI fixed
-Hidden unit 'Invader' color break fix
-Hidden unit 'Squall' color break fix
-Hidden model 'Tiamat' color break fix
-Leaderboard player name ID font revision.
-UI output delay fix

In addition, we'll deliver the following updates that we're working on through our update news.
We would love to get your feedback and would apply it on our game improvement and additional contents. Please contact us via email, customer support center and official Instagram channel.

Thank you for your support.


About the Game

Board the Brix Core, piloted by Prince Brix himself. Combine aircrafts in different ways to gain abilities and grab crystals to boost your firepower.
It'll take split-second decisions, expert control, and a bit of luck to survive this gauntlet. Can Prince Brix defeat the evil looming before him and save the world?



Game Features
- Fusion system lets you combine with randomly-appearing aircrafts
- Upgrade system lets you collect experience points to power up your aircraft
- Strategic elements - change crafts at the right time to survive the waves of bullets
- Secret units with massive power
- Challenge Mode lets you compete with friends for high scores
- Online leaderboard encourages you to step up your game

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Traditional Chinese, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil
